mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS reflects strengthening household demand and raises expected corporate revenue growth, producing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the retail sales trend improves.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot included April 2014 RSAFS vintage value
failure_condition: Reject if walk-forward tests show 20-day S&P 500 returns are not higher after positive 3-month RSAFS growth than after negative 3-month RSAFS growth, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE indicates improving labor income and lower recession probability, which increases expected earnings stability and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot showed April 2014 UNRATE vintage value of 6.3
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than the unconditional base rate, or if average triggered returns are not statistically above baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS path raises the discount rate applied to future cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after a clear policy-rate upshift.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot showed April 2014 FEDFUNDS vintage value of 0.09
failure_condition: Reject if, after FEDFUNDS crosses upward by more than 0.25pp over 3 months, 60-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 60% of cases and average returns are not below unconditional average returns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous gains in HOUST and PAYEMS indicate housing-led demand expansion supported by job creation, increasing cyclical earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot included March 2014 HOUST and April 2014 PAYEMS vintages
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST and PAYEMS trigger does not outperform either single-series trigger over 60 trading days, or if triggered 60-day returns are not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A negative break in INDPRO shows weakening factory output and utilization, reducing near-term revenue and margin expectations for cyclical firms and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot included April 2014 INDPRO vintage value
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered average returns are not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains pinned near zero, real short rates fall and inflation uncertainty rises, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot showed April 2014 FEDFUNDS near the zero lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS joint trigger has nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if its downside hit rate is not higher than the unconditional downside frequency.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDPC1 growth raises aggregate income and expected economy-wide earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as quarterly growth information is incorporated.
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot included 2014Q1 GDPC1 vintage value
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarter-over-quarter GDPC1 growth is not followed by higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than nonpositive GDPC1 growth, or if the 60-day return spread is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth combined with a rising UNRATE indicates job creation that is insufficient to absorb labor supply, increasing recession-risk pricing and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth > 0 and UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.2pp
evidence_refs: fact:2014-05-15 snapshot included April 2014 labor-market vintages
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-rising trigger is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than the unconditional positive frequency or if the signal loses negative Rank IC over two consecutive years.
